content: If we frame the linguistic definition of reflexion as a fundamental 'reflective mirror' for all self-improvement processes, we can hypothesize that explicitly anchoring Self-Refine’s iterative LLM refinement pipeline to the layered meaning of reflexion (as both signal reflection and deliberate cognitive reflection) will reduce ungrounded feedback loops and improve output alignment with human intent. This reframing turns a static vocabulary definition into a structural guardrail for autonomous AI refinement.
